name: acadify
description: LMS platform with course management, lectures, and student progress tracking

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "cd server && bun run dev" "cd client && bun run dev"
scripts.build: cd server && bun run build && cd ../client && bun run build
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd client && bun install && cd ../server && bun install
